zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Fulford於大約1185年出生在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 福爾福德時，他的父親Sir William I Fulford26歲，母親de Fulford35歲。他於大約1219年與Mrs. Nicolas Fulford結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1235年享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named in Devon, such as Fulford in Tiverton, Great Fulford in Dunsford, Fullaford in High Bray, Fulford Bridge in Shebbear, Fullaford in Sampford Courtenay, and Fullaford in Buckfastleigh.

habitational name from one or more of the various places so called elsewhere in England, such as Fulford (Staffordshire), Fulford in Kingston Saint Mary (Somerset), Gate Fulford and Water Fulford (both East Yorkshire), Fulfords Farm in Itchingfield (Sussex), and Fulforth in Witton Gilbert (Durham). All places in 1 above and 2 are named from Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Fulford was born about 1185, in Great Fulford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William I Fulford, was 26 and his mother, de Fulford, was 35. He married Mrs. Nicolas Fulford about 1219. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1235, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Fulford est né environ 1185, à Great Fulford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William I Fulford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, de Fulford, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Nicolas Fulford environ 1219. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1235, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Fulfordが約1185年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト フウルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir William I Fulfordは26歳，母de Fulfordは35歳であった。約1219年にMrs. Nicolas Fulfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1235年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Fulford(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 프퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William I Fulford(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 de Fulford(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1219년 Mrs. Nicolas Fulford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1235년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Fulford родился около 1185 г. в местности грит фьулфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William I Fulford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали de Fulford, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Nicolas Fulford около 1219 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1235 г. в возрасте 51 год.
